resources.string: Server is unreachable. Check your network or IP address.
Request timed out. The server took too long to respond.
Network error. Please check your internet connection.
Data parsing error. The server response is not in the expected format.
The server returned an HTML page instead of JSON. Check your proxy/SSO configuration.
Invalid credentials. Please check your API key or login details.
Access denied. You don\'t have permission to view this.
Resource not found on the server.
A server error occurred. Please try again later.
Use the Healthchecks API key and instance URL.
Find the API key in Project → Settings. Read-only keys can only view data; full-access keys enable edits.

This companion app is proudly Open Source and developed in my free time, and I am a student, so if you found it useful, I gladly accept donations (any crypto on EVM chain is fine) at the following address:
Apply neon borders and brand gradients to Home service cards.
View logs to troubleshoot connection and parsing issues.
You will need to log in again by entering URL and API Key.
Ad and malicious domains are being blocked.
Add a new domain to the %s list.
Set a custom duration in minutes.
No query log entries match current filters
Enter a URL to auto-fetch the icon
Set a 6-digit PIN to protect your app
Enter your PIN again to confirm
Your PIN and biometric settings will be removed. Anyone can access the app.
Enter your current PIN to continue
Open Tailscale VPN to access your homelab securely from anywhere
No instances yet. Add one to connect.
This removes only this configured instance.
These logs capture requests, responses, and parsing errors.
No logs yet. Actions in the app will appear here.
Leave blank to keep current secret when only label or fallback changed
Create an access token in Portainer under My account > Access tokens.
Use the password or API token configured in Pi-hole under Settings > API / Web interface.
Use your AdGuard Home admin username and password.
If 2FA is enabled, use an app token instead of your password.
Are you sure you want to delete this category and all its bookmarks?
Are you sure you want to delete this bookmark?
This will permanently delete the check.
Schedule is required for cron checks
Timeout is required for simple checks
This key can only view checks, so edit actions are hidden.
Use the email and password of your Nginx Proxy Manager admin account.
Two-factor authentication on Nginx Proxy Manager is not supported from the app. If 2FA is enabled on your account, login from the app may fail.
I agree to the Let\'s Encrypt TOS
Are you sure you want to delete this?
Leave blank to keep the current password.
No query log entries match current filters
No hosts found for this filter.
Delete %1$s and all related PatchMon data? This action cannot be undone.
Docker integration data is not available.
In PatchMon: Integrations → Scoped Credentials → create token with GET and DELETE.

1) Open PatchMon → Integrations → Scoped Credentials.\n2) Create token with Host permissions: GET and DELETE only.\n3) Leave Allowed IP empty (or add your client IP), then copy Token Key and Token Secret here.
Host cannot be deleted due to related data constraints.
Access denied: this IP is not allowed in PatchMon token restrictions.
Access denied: missing required PatchMon scopes.
Host not found. It may have already been removed.
PatchMon is busy (rate limit). Please retry shortly.
PatchMon server error. Please try again later.
Too many requests. Please wait and retry.
Your digital home, organized and simple.
Do you want to set a lock code to protect the app?
Use the Jellystat API key and instance URL.
Tracked watch time and recent trends from your Jellyfin usage.
